name: hack.CCM — AI Microlearning Platform
description: AI-powered clinical microlearning platform. Ingests medical PDFs, extracts structured summaries and clinical pearls via LLMs, and serves them through a FastAPI web dashboard.

entryPoints: main_app.py — FastAPI web app (public dashboard at /)

pipelines.name: Ingestion
pipelines.description: Watches input_pdfs/, extracts structured JSON summaries (Pass 1) and clinical pearls (Pass 2) via LLMs

pipelines.name: Maintenance
pipelines.description: Health checks, schema validation, repairs, error-priority reports

pipelines.name: Sync
pipelines.description: Git sync, email dispatch, subscriber list sync

modules: config.py — Paths, API keys, model names, extraction parameters
schema.py — JSON schemas and system prompts for LLM extraction
llm.py — LLM client abstraction (Together AI, Gemini, custom)
ocr.py — OCR pipeline for scanned PDFs
tracking.py — Atomic JSON save/load, edit locks
errors.py — Monthly error log rotation and reading
storage.py — Atomic JSON writer, git push worker

dataFlow.input:
input_pdfs/articles/ — Medical PDF articles
input_pdfs/guidelines/ — Clinical guidelines PDFs
dataFlow.processing: generator.py watches input → Pass 1 (extract summary JSON) → Pass 2 (extract pearls)
dataFlow.output:
output_files/{system}/{type}/{filename}.json — Structured summaries
pearls.json — All extracted pearls
sent_summaries.json — Processed file ledger
